action_boundary: Should demo data share S7-PRV-012 proceed on 2026-07-03?

documents.text: This source record is synthetic and fictional. It contains no real customer, worker, vendor, bank, security, payment, logistics, public-benefits, legal, or operational data.
Demo share request S7-012 asks to share dataset D12 on 2026-07-03.
Data addendum DPA-S7-012 was effective through 2026-07-02 for dataset D12.
Destination record DEST-S7-012 matches dataset D12.
Data sharing requires the addendum to be current on the action date.
